**What's wrong?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Did it break after a Google Chat update?**
If the skin stopped applying, please paste the output of `tools/health-check.js`
(open a conversation → DevTools console → paste the file). It names the exact selector
that changed.

```
<paste health-check output here>
```
